get.description:
Browser flow that generates a long-lived (30 day) MCP refresh token for the authenticated user and redirects to a localhost callback URL with the token as a query parameter. Used by CLI tooling (similar to Google's OAuth CLI flow).

The callback URL must match one of the localhost patterns (`http://localhost:<port>/...`, `http://127.0.0.1:<port>/...`, or `http://[::1]:<port>/...`).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Localhost URL to redirect to with `?token=<refresh-token>` on success.

302.description: Redirect to the callback URL with the newly-issued refresh token appended as a `?token=` query parameter.
